node.text: Auto currently resolves to Standard display. Use an override to preview or lock a profile explicitly.
When enabled, the display profile adjusts automatically when the device is rotated. Off by default.
Hostname or IP from the C64 menu.
Network password from the C64 manual, if defined
When no hardware is found during discovery, automatically offer Demo Mode for this session.
Automatic Demo Mode Automatic Demo Mode
Emits all debug-level logs for diagnostics, including SAF and REST events.
Export or import non-sensitive settings (connection timing, safety presets, and diagnostics).
Controls how many playlist or disk items are shown before opening View all. Default is 50.

Classic KERNAL load mounts the disk and uses LOAD"*",8,1 then RUN. DMA (Direct Memory Access) extracts the first PRG from a D64/D71/D81 image and writes it directly to C64 memory for faster starts. Some loaders may not like DMA.
When no hardware is found during discovery, automatically offer Demo Mode for this session.
Startup Discovery Window (seconds) Startup Discovery Window (seconds)
Background Rediscovery Interval (seconds) Background Rediscovery Interval (seconds)
Enable HVSC downloads Shows HVSC download and ingest controls on the Play page.
Enable the online archive source. It appears in the Add Items interstitial when enabled.
Enter a hostname only. Invalid values fall back to the default archive host immediately.
Native apps allow the default cleartext hosts. Override hosts can be blocked by platform security, especially on iOS, until the native allow-list is updated.
Relaxed safety mode may affect hardware stability.
Mode presets adjust throttling, caching, cooldowns, and backoff behavior. Troubleshooting mode also enables debug logging for richer diagnostics.
Tune discovery timing to reduce connection churn or speed up detection.
Fine-tuned device protection changes apply immediately.
Minimum delay between consecutive config write calls. Default 500 ms.
Controls how often drag previews are sent while device-backed sliders are moving, including CPU, playback volume, SID mixer, and lighting controls. Default 200 ms. Range 100–500 ms.
User-triggered actions can bypass circuit breaker.
Tap a notification to open Diagnostics. Swipe to dismiss.
About Version 0.7.0-2d6f5 Git ID 2d6f57b5 Build Time 2026-03-28 15:05:14 UTC REST API v0.1 Ultimate REST API Documentation Open Source Licenses
